TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Malabang, title = Malabang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Malabang} }

S.FORM: alang Malabang ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 200 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malabang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Malabang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Malabang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malabang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Malabang hya' ga Mepuwal. tay 'zil na Malabang hya' ga Suru. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Malabang ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 200 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Malabang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Malabang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Malabang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Malabang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Malabang hya' ga Mepuwal. tay 'zil na Malabang hya' ga Suru. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ malaβaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mepuwal. taj ʔzil na malaβaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuru. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
